name: Goblin Biker Clatter Sploder
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>百鬼羅刹</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ゴブリンライダー</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby> <ruby lang="jp"><rb>爆</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ばく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>音</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>おん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>クラッタ
desc: If this card is Normal or Special Summoned: You can target 1 "Goblin" monster in your GY, except "Goblin Biker Clatter Sploder"; Special Summon it. During your opponent's Main Phase, if this card is in your GY (Quick Effect): You can detach 1 Xyz Material from a monster on either field, and if you do, Special Summon this card, but banish it when it leaves the field. You can only use each effect of "Goblin Biker Clatter Sploder" once per turn.
mnst_eff: If this card is Normal or Special Summoned: You can target 1 "Goblin" monster in your GY, except "Goblin Biker Clatter Sploder"; Special Summon it. During your opponent's Main Phase, if this card is in your GY (Quick Effect): You can detach 1 Xyz Material from a monster on either field, and if you do, Special Summon this card, but banish it when it leaves the field. You can only use each effect of "Goblin Biker Clatter Sploder" once per turn.
eff: If this card is Normal or Special Summoned: You can target 1 "Goblin" monster in your GY, except "Goblin Biker Clatter Sploder"; Special Summon it. During your opponent's Main Phase, if this card is in your GY (Quick Effect): You can detach 1 Xyz Material from a monster on either field, and if you do, Special Summon this card, but banish it when it leaves the field. You can only use each effect of "Goblin Biker Clatter Sploder" once per turn.

summoning: Special Summons itself from your Graveyard
banished: Banishes itself when it leaves the field
